steps.title: Find the size information
steps.content: To emphasize size, the answer must use the only note with a concrete measurement: Atitalaquia covers roughly 63 km².

steps.title: Apply the measurement to the choices
steps.content: D directly includes this area measurement (63 km²). Choices A, B, and C discuss public services, Atitalaquia's position among other municipalities, or services provided without addressing size. That matches choice D — D is correct.
